title: Keto Thai Pumpkin Stir Fry
description: A low-carb, Thai-inspired stir fry made with pumpkin and a variety of spices.
instructions: Heat coconut oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add pork rinds and cook until crispy, about 2 minutes.
Add red curry paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add pumpkin and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Push pumpkin to one side of the pan.
Crack in eggs and scramble until cooked through.
Mix eggs with pumpkin and stir-fry until combined.
Season with fish sauce to taste.
Garnish with chopped green onion and serve hot.
Serve as a low-carb, keto-friendly dinner option.
